item.title: Extra-Curricular Chaos – Strixhaven One-Shot || Dice Friends
item.description:
Kathleen’s original Strixhaven D&D game from MagicCon Vegas 2026, featuring players Reuben Bresler, Seanan McGuire, Carolyn Page, and Persephone Valentine. Support LRR: http://patreon.com/loadingreadyrun Merch: https://store.loadingreadyrun.com Discord: https://discord.gg/lrr Twitch: https://www.t....
